title: 3 Exemplary Shareholders Recognized at Annual Meeting
summary: Congratulations to our 2015 Recognition Awardees: Christopher Gene (Elder of the Year) John Craig (Board Member of the Year) John F. title: Shareholders Elect 5 Directors at Annual Meeting
summary: Ahtna shareholders elected 5 directors to the Ahtna board at this year’s Annual Meeting, which was held on Saturday, June 6, at the Glennallen High School in Glennallen, Alaska. The newly elected directors, who will each serve three-year terms (until 2018), are as follows: Class A, At-Large: Roy J....
